data.title: Belgravia Hartford doubles Bitcoin Treasury to 83 BTC by acquiring 42 BTC, marking largest purchase to date.
data.description: Belgravia Hartford Capital Inc. announced acquiring an additional 42.3776327 Bitcoin (BTC) on July 31, 2025, in what is their largest single-day purchase of the cryptocurrency to date. This surpasses their previous milestone of buying 25 BTC on July 24, 2025. The latest transaction effectively doubled Belgravia's Bitcoin holdings. The company has made significant moves in increasing its digital asset portfolio.

U.S. TARIFFS WILL BE A BIG HIT TO GLOBAL TRADE New U.S. tariffs will likely hurt global trade and reduce international competition, says Berenberg economist Atakan Bakiskan. Canada and Switzerland face especially high rates of 35% and 39%. The tariffs take effect August 7.

data.title: US Defense UMVs Market report FY2024-FY2029 highlights growth drivers, challenges, opportunities. Key for US Navy. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: A report titled "Growth Opportunities in the US Defense Unmanned Maritime Vehicles Market, FY2024-FY2029" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report focuses on the defense unmanned maritime vehicles (UMVs) market in the United States, outlining key factors that will drive growth, as well as challenges and opportunities. With increasing global security threats, UMVs are anticipated to play a significant role in enhancing the capabilities of the US Navy. The report underscores the high potential of UMV technology in bolstering defense operations.

data.title: TRON (TRX) holds $0.33 support, bullish momentum remains post-Nasdaq listing surge. Institutional interest grows as breakout potential indicated by technical analysis.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRX is currently trading at $0.33, showing bullish momentum despite a slight pullback. The recent Nasdaq listing has sparked interest from institutional investors, leading to potential breakout as indicated by technical analysis.

data.title: Imperial Oil Limited announces a 72 cents per share dividend for third quarter 2025, same as second quarter.
data.description: Imperial Oil Limited (TSE: IMO, NYSE American: IMO) based in Calgary, Alberta, announced a quarterly dividend of 72 cents per share for the third quarter of 2025. The dividend will be payable on October 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on September 4, 2025. This is consistent with the second quarter dividend of 72 cents per share. Imperial Oil has a strong track record of growth and financial stability in Canada.

data.title: Imperial's Q2 2025 net income at $949M, down $184M from 2024, with EPS at $1.86. Capital expenditures up 11% to $473M.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Imperial (TSE: IMO) (NYSE American: IMO) reported net income (loss) according to U.S. GAAP of $949 million, a decrease of $184 million from the previous year. The net income (loss) per common share, assuming dilution, was $1.86, down by $0.25 from the same quarter in 2024. Capital and exploration expenditures for the quarter totaled $473 million, representing an increase of $11 million compared to the previous year. For the first six months of 2025, Imperial's net income (loss) was $2,237 million, a decrease of $91 million compared to the same period in 2024. Net income (loss) per common share for this period was $4.38, up by $0.04 from the previous year. The total capital and exploration expenditures for the first six months amounted to $871 million, reflecting a decrease of $87 million from the previous year.

data.title: Imagine Learning's K-8 math program receives perfect EdReports scores in all categories -  Focus & Coherence, Rigor & Mathematical Practices, and Usability. Highest possible ratings achieved.
data.description: An educational program for grades K-8 has achieved top ratings in focus and coherence, rigor and mathematical practices, and usability. The program received the highest possible rating in these areas. Imagine Learning, a prominent provider of digital K-12 learning solutions, shared this news on August 1, 2025 in Tempe, Arizona.

data.title: Bybit introduces global credit incentive to promote adoption of Bybit TradFi platform; 2nd largest exchange by volume.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on August 1, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, announced a worldwide initiative to promote the adoption of its upgraded Bybit TradFi* platform. Formerly named Gold & FX, this improved service allows users to access a wide range of features...

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund declares $0.08/share distribution for August 2025, payable on August 29.
data.description: Houston-based Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. disclosed on August 1, 2025, that they will be issuing a monthly distribution of $0.08 per share for August 2025. The payment will be made to common stockholders on August 29, 2025, as outlined in the provided table.

data.title: FOXO Technologies Inc.'s Big South Fork Medical Center joins Covenant Health network to provide swing bed services in Tennessee.
data.description: FOXO Technologies Inc. (NYSE American: FOXO) disclosed that its rural hospital, Big South Fork Medical Center in Oneida, Tennessee, has finalized a Performance Network Agreement with Covenant Health to offer swing bed services. This agreement signifies Big South Fork's status as a designated critical access hospital. Covenant Health, a major hospital network in Knoxville and East Tennessee, serves numerous facilities across the region. The agreement is expected to enhance the medical services available to the residents of the area.
